title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: OpenLearnX: Critical Authentication Bypass via JWT Signature Verification Disabled Leading to Account Takeover
description:
### Overview

A critical authentication vulnerability was identified in OpenLearnX that could allow unauthorized access to user accounts under specific conditions. The issue has been fixed.

**Advisory**:  https://github.com/th30d4y/OpenLearnX/security/advisories/GHSA-223g-f5mq-gw33

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in OpenLearnX allows attackers to bypass authentication by exploiting a flaw in JWT signature verification. This could lead to unauthorized access, account takeovers, and potential data breaches, especially in systems where sensitive information is stored or processed.
recommended_actions: Immediately update OpenLearnX to the latest patched version as per the advisory: https://github.com/th30d4y/OpenLearnX/security/advisories/GHSA-223g-f5mq-gw33.
Audit and monitor logs for any suspicious login activities or unauthorized access attempts to identify potential exploitation of the vulnerability.
Implement additional security measures, such as multi-factor authentication (MFA), to mitigate the risk of account takeover.

title: Astro: Server island encrypted parameters vulnerable to cross-component replay
description:
### Impact

Astro versions prior to 6.1.10 used AES-GCM encryption to protect the confidentiality and integrity of server island props and slots parameters, but did not bind the ciphertext to its intended component or parameter type. An attacker could replay one component's encrypted props (`p`) value as another component's slots (`s`) value, or vice versa.

Since slots contain raw unescaped HTML while props may contain user-controlled values, this could lead to XSS in applications that meet **a

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45028.

title: Klever-Go MultiDataInterceptor has remote OOM via crafted compressed P2P payload
description:
## Summary

A remote, unauthenticated denial-of-service vulnerability in
`Batch.Decompress` (`data/batch/batch.go`) allows any peer that
participates in a topic served by `MultiDataInterceptor` to allocate
multi-gigabyte heaps on the receiving node from a sub-50 KiB gossip
payload. A single packet is sufficient to OOM-kill a validator with
conventional memory provisioning. Fleet-wide application affects chain
liveness.

The vulnerability was identified during an internal security review of
`core

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to trigger an out-of-memory (OOM) condition on nodes participating in the affected P2P network, potentially causing denial-of-service (DoS) and disrupting chain liveness. Validators with conventional memory provisioning are particularly at risk, which could lead to widespread network instability.
recommended_actions: Apply memory allocation limits to nodes to prevent excessive heap allocation from malformed payloads.
Patch the affected `Batch.Decompress` function in `MultiDataInterceptor` to validate and restrict incoming compressed payload sizes.
Monitor network traffic for abnormal gossip payloads and implement rate-limiting or filtering mechanisms.

title: Authlib OIDC Implicit/Hybrid Authorization Vulnerable to Open Redirect
description:
### Summary

An unauthenticated open redirect in Authlib's `OpenIDImplicitGrant` and `OpenIDHybridGrant` authorization endpoint lets a remote attacker cause the authorization server to issue an HTTP 302 to an attacker-chosen URL by submitting an authorization request that omits the `openid` scope.

### Details

#### Vulnerable code

`OpenIDImplicitGrant.validate_authorization_request` in `authlib/oidc/core/grants/implicit.py`:

```python
def validate_authorization_request(self):
    if not is_op

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44681.

description:

The attacker can execute arbitrary code without being authenticated

### Mitigation

title: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Claris FileMaker Cloud allowed a user with Admin Console...
description: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Claris FileMaker Cloud allowed a user with Admin Console privileges to bypass a front-end restriction on OS Script schedule types and execute arbitrary operating system commands on the underlying host. This issue is fixed in FileMaker Cloud 2.22.0.5.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-43680.

title: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Claris FileMaker Cloud allowed a user with Admin Console...
description: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Claris FileMaker Cloud allowed a user with Admin Console privileges to inject arbitrary operating system commands through unsanitized input in the External ODBC Data Source connection test feature. This issue is fixed in FileMaker Cloud 2.22.0.5.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an attacker with Admin Console privileges to execute arbitrary operating system commands, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, or lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Claris FileMaker Cloud to version 2.22.0.5 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict Admin Console access to trusted personnel and enforce strong authentication mechanisms.
Conduct a security audit to identify any unauthorized access or potential exploitation of this vulnerability.

title: The The Advanced Custom Fields: Extended plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary...
description: The The Advanced Custom Fields: Extended plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary shortcode execution in all versions up to, and including, 0.9.2.3. This is due to the software allowing users to execute an action that does not properly validate a value before running do_shortcode. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary shortcodes.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary shortcodes, potentially leading to unauthorized actions such as data exposure, privilege escalation, or website defacement. This could compromise the integrity and security of affected WordPress sites.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Advanced Custom Fields: Extended plugin to a patched version (if available) or disable the plugin temporarily.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block unauthorized shortcode execution attempts.
Review and monitor server logs for any suspicious activity or unauthorized shortcode execution.

title: The installation of Fuji Tellus adds a driver to the kernel which grants all users read and write...
description: The installation of Fuji Tellus adds a driver to the kernel which grants all users read and write permissions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8108.

title: The MonsterInsights – Google Analytics Dashboard for WordPress (Website Stats Made Easy) plugin...
description: The MonsterInsights – Google Analytics Dashboard for WordPress (Website Stats Made Easy) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access and modification of data due to a missing capability checks on the get_ads_access_token() and reset_experience() functions in all versions up to, and including, 10.1.2. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to retrieve live Google OAuth access tokens and reset Plugins's Google Ads integration.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with minimal privileges (Subscriber-level access or higher) to retrieve live Google OAuth access tokens and reset the plugin's Google Ads integration. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive analytics data, disruption of Google Ads campaigns, and potential misuse of OAuth tokens for further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the MonsterInsights plugin to the latest patched version (if available) or disable the plugin temporarily until a fix is released.
Restrict user roles and permissions to limit Subscriber-level access, ensuring only trusted users have access to the WordPress dashboard.
Monitor Google OAuth access tokens and Google Ads integration for unauthorized changes or suspicious activity.

title: The Court Reservation – Manage Your Court Bookings Online plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to...
description: The Court Reservation – Manage Your Court Bookings Online plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the ‘id’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.10.11 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query.  This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to perform SQL Injection attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive database information, data exfiltration, or even complete compromise of the affected WordPress site.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using WordPress
recommended_actions: Immediately update the plugin to a patched version if available or disable it until a fix is released.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block SQL Injection attempts.
Review and sanitize all user inputs and database queries to prevent future vulnerabilities.

title: Linux ksmbd contains a remote memory corruption vulnerability in the ACL inheritance path that...
description: Linux ksmbd contains a remote memory corruption vulnerability in the ACL inheritance path that allows remote clients with directory creation permissions to trigger a heap out-of-bounds read and subsequent heap corruption by setting a crafted DACL with a malformed SID containing an inflated num_subauth field. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability by creating a directory, setting the malicious DACL via SMB2_SET_INFO, and creating child entries to cause kernel instability, denial of service, or

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8449.

title: Heym before 0.0.21 contains a sandbox escape vulnerability in the custom Python tool executor...
description: Heym before 0.0.21 contains a sandbox escape vulnerability in the custom Python tool executor that allows authenticated workflow authors to bypass sandbox restrictions by using object-graph introspection primitives. Attackers can use Python introspection techniques to recover the unrestricted __import__ function, import blocked modules such as os and subprocess, and access inherited backend environment variables containing database credentials and encryption keys to execute arbitrary host comman

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45227.

title: Heym before 0.0.21 contains a path traversal vulnerability in the file upload endpoint that...
description: Heym before 0.0.21 contains a path traversal vulnerability in the file upload endpoint that allows authenticated users to write attacker-controlled files to arbitrary locations by supplying a crafted filename with traversal sequences. Attackers can exploit the unvalidated filename parameter in the upload_file() handler to bypass path restrictions and write, read, or delete files outside the intended storage directory.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45225.

title: Heym before 0.0.21 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in workflow execution that...
description: Heym before 0.0.21 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in workflow execution that allows authenticated users to execute arbitrary workflows by referencing victim workflow UUIDs without proper access validation. Attackers can create workflows with execute nodes or agent subWorkflowIds pointing to victim workflow UUIDs to load and execute those workflows under attacker-controlled execution paths, exposing victim workflow outputs and triggering workflow nodes with unintended side effects

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45226.

title: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the command line interface (CLI) service accessed by...
description: Command injection vulnerabilities exist in the command line interface (CLI) service accessed by the PAPI protocol of AOS-8 and AOS-10 Operating Systems. Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying operating system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44871.

title: PowerSYSTEM Center feature for device project groups allows an authenticated user with limited...
description: PowerSYSTEM Center feature for device project groups allows an authenticated user with limited permissions to perform an unauthorized deletion of project groups.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users with limited permissions to delete project groups, potentially causing disruption to workflows, loss of critical data, and operational downtime.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-35555.
Restrict access to PowerSYSTEM Center by implementing stricter role-based access controls (RBAC).
Monitor and audit user activities within PowerSYSTEM Center to detect and respond to unauthorized actions promptly.

title: PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint for device account export allows an authenticated user with...
description: PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint for device account export allows an authenticated user with limited permissions to expose sensitive information normally restricted to administrative permissions only.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users with limited permissions to access sensitive data typically restricted to administrators, potentially leading to unauthorized data exposure and privilege escalation.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply patches or updates provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-26289.
Restrict access to the PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint to only trusted users and monitor API usage for suspicious activity.
Conduct a security audit to identify and mitigate any other potential misconfigurations or vulnerabilities.

title: PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint for devices allows a low privilege authenticated user to...
description: PowerSYSTEM Center REST API endpoint for devices allows a low privilege authenticated user to access information normally limited by operational permissions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33570.

title: UltraJSON has a Memory Leak in ujson.dump() on Write Failure
description:
### Summary

When `ujson.dump()` writes to a file-like object and the write operation raises an exception, the serialized JSON string object is not decremented, leaking memory. Each failed write operation leaks the full size of the serialized payload.

Code that uses `ujson.dumps()` rather than `ujson.dump()` or only JSON load/decode methods is unaffected.

### Details

**Vulnerability Location:**
- `src/ujson/python/objToJSON.c:913` - `objToJSONFile()` function start
- `src/ujson/python/objToJS

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The memory leak in ujson.dump() can lead to resource exhaustion on systems handling large or frequent JSON serialization tasks, potentially causing application crashes or degraded performance. This is particularly concerning for applications processing high volumes of data or running in resource-constrained environments.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest patched version of UltraJSON that addresses CVE-2026-44660, if available.
Replace usage of ujson.dump() with ujson.dumps() or other JSON serialization libraries that do not exhibit this vulnerability.
Implement monitoring and alerting for memory usage in applications using UltraJSON to detect potential leaks.

title: CVE-2026-23928 - The Item history widget (in Zabbix 7.0+) or the Plain text widget (in Zabbix 6.0) can execute inject
description: The Item history widget (in Zabbix 7.0+) or the Plain text widget (in Zabbix 6.0) can execute injected JavaScript when HTML display is enabled. This can allow an attacker to perform unauthorized actions depending on which user opens a dashboard containing these widgets. The malicious JavaScript would have to come from a monitored host controlled by the attacker. Note: the Item history widget is a replacement for the Plain text widget since Zabbix 7.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute malicious JavaScript in the context of Zabbix dashboards, potentially leading to unauthorized actions such as data exfiltration, privilege escalation, or further compromise of the system. The impact depends on the privileges of the user viewing the compromised dashboard.
recommended_actions: Disable HTML display in the affected widgets (Item history in Zabbix 7.0+ and Plain text in Zabbix 6.0) until a patch is applied.
Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by Zabbix to address this vulnerability.
Restrict access to Zabbix dashboards to trusted users and monitor for any suspicious activity or unauthorized changes.

title: CVE-2026-23927 - A user able to connect to Agent 2 can inject an Oracle TNS connection string via the 'service' param
description: A user able to connect to Agent 2 can inject an Oracle TNS connection string via the 'service' parameter. This can lead to Agent 2 connecting to an attacker-controlled server and leaking Oracle database credentials if they are saved in a named session.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23927.

title: CVE-2026-23926 - An authenticated (non-super) administrator can create a maintenance period with a JavaScript payload
description: An authenticated (non-super) administrator can create a maintenance period with a JavaScript payload that is executed by any user that opens tooltip for that maintenance period in the Host navigator widget. This can allow the attacker to perform unauthorized actions depending on which user opens the tooltip.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-23926.

title: CVE-2026-2306 - The Ninja Tables – Easy Data Table Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized databa
description: The Ninja Tables – Easy Data Table Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized database table creation due to missing authorization checks on the `createFluentCartTable` function in all versions up to, and including, 5.2.6. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to create arbitrary Ninja Tables in the database which can lead to database pollution and resource exhaustion.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2306.

title: CVE-2026-5753 - The All-in-One WP Migration Unlimited Extension plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Author
description: The All-in-One WP Migration Unlimited Extension plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 2.83. This is due to the 'Ai1wmve_Schedules_Controller::save' handler for 'admin_post_ai1wm_schedule_event_save' not verifying user capabilities before saving schedule data. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to create scheduled export jobs and send backup notifications to attacker-controlled email addresses. Because such notifications include the random backup filename, full site backups can subsequently be downloaded from the target site, resulting in sensitive information exposure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5753.

title: CVE-2026-3208 - The Mercado Pago payments for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access
description: The Mercado Pago payments for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data due to a missing capability check on the 'mp_pix_image' WooCommerce API endpoint in all versions up to, and including, 8.7.11. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to retrieve PIX payment QR code images for arbitrary orders. PIX QR codes contain sensitive merchant information including PIX keys (which may be CPF/CNPJ personal identifiers), transaction amounts, merchant name and city, and MercadoPago transaction references.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3208.

title: CVE-2026-7573 - An authorization bypass (CWE-639) in the GetUserRoles gRPC API endpoint in Velocidex Velociraptor be
description: An authorization bypass (CWE-639) in the GetUserRoles gRPC API endpoint in Velocidex Velociraptor below version 0.76.5 allows any authenticated low-privilege user to retrieve the complete ACL policy (roles and permissions) for any user across all organizations by supplying targeted Name and Org parameters via a network request.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7573.

title: CVE-2026-7572 - An off-by-one error (CWE-193) in the ConsumeUnit16Array and ConsumeUnit64Array functions in Velocide
description: An off-by-one error (CWE-193) in the ConsumeUnit16Array and ConsumeUnit64Array functions in Velocidex Velociraptor before version 0.76.5 on Windows and Linux allows a local attacker to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a process crash by providing a specially crafted .evtx file to the parse_evtx VQL plugin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7572.
